## 要求

**app/[locale]/knowledge/page.tsx 需要：**
- Server Component（无 "use client"）
- `generateMetadata` 使用 getTranslations 读取 knowledge.title 和 knowledge.subtitle
- 默认导出渲染 `<KnowledgeList locale={params.locale} />`
- 外层包 `div` 有 `h-[calc(100vh-64px)] overflow-hidden`

**app/[locale]/knowledge/[slug]/page.tsx 需要：**
- Server Component
- `generateStaticParams` 返回所有 slug（调用 getAllSlugs）
- `generateMetadata` 按 locale 返回 titleZh/titleEn 和 descZh/descEn
- 默认导出：调用 findKnowledgeItem → notFound() 如果没找到；调用 demoLoader → notFound() 如果没注册；await demoLoader() 获取 DemoComponent；渲染 `<DemoComponent locale={...} backHref={...} />`

## 你的工作

- `d:\geekiblog\.worktrees\knowledge\app\[locale]\knowledge\page.tsx`
- `d:\geekiblog\.worktrees\knowledge\app\[locale]\knowledge\[slug]\page.tsx`

```json
  "contents": "import type { Metadata } from \"next\";\nimport { getTranslations } from \"next-intl/server\";\nimport { KnowledgeList } from \"@/components/knowledge/knowledge-list\";\n\nexport async function generateMetadata({\n  params,\n}: {\n  params: { locale: string };\n}): Promise<Metadata> {\n  const t = await getTranslations({ locale: params.locale, namespace: \"knowledge\" });\n  return {\n    title: t(\"title\"),\n    description: t(\"subtitle\"),\n  };\n}\n\nexport default function KnowledgePage({\n  params,\n}: {\n  params: { locale: string };\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex h-[calc(100vh-64px)] overflow-hidden\">\n      <KnowledgeList locale={params.locale} />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",

}
```

```json
{
  "contents": "import { notFound } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport type { Metadata } from \"next\";\nimport { findKnowledgeItem, getAllSlugs } from \"@/lib/knowledge-data\";\nimport { DEMO_REGISTRY } from \"@/components/knowledge/demos/_registry\";\n\ninterface PageProps {\n  params: { locale: string; slug: string };\n}\n\nexport async function generateStaticParams() {\n  return getAllSlugs().map((slug) => ({ slug }));\n}\n\nexport async function generateMetadata({ params }: PageProps): Promise<Metadata> {\n  const found = findKnowledgeItem(params.slug);\n  if (!found) return {};\n  const { item } = found;\n  return {\n    title: params.locale === \"zh\" ? item.titleZh : item.titleEn,\n    description: params.locale === \"zh\" ? item.descZh : item.descEn,\n  };\n}\n\nexport default async function KnowledgeDemoPage({ params }: PageProps) {\n  const found = findKnowledgeItem(params.slug);\n  if (!found) notFound();\n\n  const demoLoader = DEMO_REGISTRY[params.slug];\n  if (!demoLoader) notFound();\n\n  const { default: DemoComponent } = await demoLoader();\n\n  return (\n    <DemoComponent\n      locale={params.locale}\n      backHref={`/${params.locale}/knowledge`}\n    />\n  );\n}\n",
  "totalLinesInFile": 40
}
```

</details>

## 审查结果

---

### `app/[locale]/knowledge/page.tsx`

| 条目 | 状态 |
|---|---|
| Server Component（无 `"use client"`） | ✅ |
| `generateMetadata` 调用 `getTranslations`，namespace 为 `"knowledge"` | ✅ |
| 读取 `t("title")` 和 `t("subtitle")` | ✅ |
| 默认导出渲染 `<KnowledgeList locale={params.locale} />` | ✅ |
| 外层 `div` 含 `h-[calc(100vh-64px)] overflow-hidden` | ✅（含额外 `flex`，见备注） |

**备注：** 第 23 行外层 `div` 的 className 为 `"flex h-[calc(100vh-64px)] overflow-hidden"`，比规格多了一个 `flex`。规格要求的两个类都存在，不算违反，但属于规格未提及的扩展。

---

### `app/[locale]/knowledge/[slug]/page.tsx`

| 条目 | 状态 |
|---|---|
| Server Component（无 `"use client"`） | ✅ |
| `generateStaticParams` 调用 `getAllSlugs()` 返回所有 slug | ✅ |
| `generateMetadata` 按 locale 返回 `titleZh`/`titleEn`、`descZh`/`descEn` | ✅ |
| 默认导出调用 `findKnowledgeItem` → `notFound()` | ✅ |
| 查 `DEMO_REGISTRY[slug]` → `notFound()` 如果未注册 | ✅ |
| `await demoLoader()` 解构 `default: DemoComponent` | ✅ |
| 渲染 `<DemoComponent locale={...} backHref={...} />` | ✅ |

**备注：** `generateStaticParams` 只返回 `{ slug }`（第 11 行），未包含 `locale`。对于 `[locale]/knowledge/[slug]` 这类嵌套动态路由，Next.js 的 `generateStaticParams` 在子段页面中只需返回当前段的参数（`slug`），父段 `[locale]` 由上层路由负责，行为正确。

---

### 总结

两个文件均 ✅ 符合规格，无实质性违反。唯一的细微差异是 `page.tsx:23` 外层 div 多了 `flex` 类，不影响规格要求，属于可接受的布局扩展。
